allow:
Bash(node -e "
const normal = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'
const noconfuse = 'ABCDEFGHJKMNPQRSTWXYZ'
const excludedUpper = [...normal].filter\(c => !noconfuse.includes\(c\)\)
console.log\('Excluded uppercase:', excludedUpper\)

const normalLower = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
const noconfuseLower = 'abcdefghjkmnpqrstwxyz'
const excludedLower = [...normalLower].filter\(c => !noconfuseLower.includes\(c\)\)
console.log\('Excluded lowercase:', excludedLower\)

const normalNum = '0123456789'
const noconfuseNum = '2345678'
const excludedNum = [...normalNum].filter\(c => !noconfuseNum.includes\(c\)\)
console.log\('Excluded numbers:', excludedNum\)
")
